name: West Point Gold Corp.
description: West Point Gold Corp. (formerly Gold79 Mines Ltd.) is a publicly listed exploration-stage junior mining company headquartered in Vancouver, Canada. The company is primarily focused on the identification, acquisition, evaluation, and development of high-potential gold and silver mineral properties in North America. Its portfolio includes four significant projects located within the prolific Walker Lane Trend in Nevada and Arizona, USA, including its flagship Gold Chain project in the historic Oatman District of Arizona. The company is dedicated to advancing these assets through systematic exploration to discover and develop significant precious metal deposits.
